titleStmt.title: SII 20.101: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 101. (B.K. No. 120 of 1938-39.) KĀMADHĒNU, KALGHATGI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in front of the Kallēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 54, Saumya, Chaitra s11u. 2, Monday. Saṁkrānti. The tithi corresponds to A.D. 1129, March 23 which was Saturday. The Mēsha-saṁkrānti occurred on the next day.

The inscription records a gift of land and money to god Kalidēvasvāmi of Sāsalu by Malliseṭṭi of Hulivara when Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jayakēsidēva of the Kadamba family was governing Koṁkaṇa-900 and Palasige-12000 divisions. The gift land which was purchased by the donor from Sōmēśvara-bhaṭṭa, the son of Nārāyaṇabhaṭṭa, the ūroḍeya of Sāsalu, and two others, was entrusted into the hands of Tējōrāśi-paṇḍita, the disciple of Dēvarāśi-paṇḍita, the āchārya of the temple. The record gives a genealogical account of the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
bi caṁdracāmaracāravē trailō
stasmai varāhāya
haṁ khaṇakhaṇā
© svasti samastabhuva nāśrayaṁ śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāraThe letter jā is engraved below the line.
kaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatu bhūlōkamalladēvara vija
yarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛdhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ kallyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷu
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi koṁkaṇacakravartti sthiraṁ jīyāt .
© svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsipuravarādhīśvaraṁ malege bhairavaṁ kā
daṁbakūrmmaṁ kūrmmāvatāraṁ mūrttinārāyaṇaṁ kīrtilatākaṁdaṁ saṁkrāntidhavaḷaṁ niśśaṁkarāma(ṁ)nabhina
vapārthaṁ subhaṭaratīrtthaṁ niṁdirivātaṁ pāradi parasurāmanubhayadēsivallabhaṁ tribhuvanamalla maṁḍaḷikaśi
khāmaṇi kādaṁbacūḍāmaṇīttyakhiḷarājyāvaḷīsamāḷaṁkritarappa śrīmajjaya kēsidēvaru koṁkaṇavoṁ
bhainūṟumaṁ palasigepannircchāsiramumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamire . gaṇapatyāya namaḥ .
© vāsugi baṇṇisa lartthiyiṁ dēsaśikhāmaṇiyenippa palasigenāḍoḷ sāsalu sōbhisutirkkuṁ vāsavanamarāvatipura
kaṁḍikamenalu . su naṁdavanadoḷagatyaṁta ṣōbheverasidulivaragiḷiyiṁ kattalipuva ḍakedōṁṭadiṇittaluvatiramyavenipa
sāsalu celvu [.] biṁkadinesedī sāsaliṁ teṁkaṇadeseyalli baṁdu nelasiye niṁdaṁ śaṁkarasvayaṁbhuvenisida kuṁkumalōḷaṁ kapāḷi kalidē
vēśa . muntaṇa bāviya baḷasiga tiṁtiṇi pūdōṁṭavalli bāḷeya banadiṁdaṁntorppe teṁgu kauvuṁgiṁdintu karaṁ celpu śūḷi nelasi
rddiḷeyoḷ . śrīsuranaragaruḍōraga bhāsuramaṇimakuṭapuṭṭitāṁghriyugaṁ gaurīśanabhavaṁ bhavaṁ pura sāsalalliṁnteseye ni
ndakalidēvēśa . Antu samastavistāramanoḷakoṇḍoppi tōrppaṁ sāsalūroḍeyaru . © svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhā
raṇamaunānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśī ḷasaṁpannarvviditavēdārttha vidyāpārāvāraraghakuḷavidūraragniṣṭōmādyanēkayajñardha
rmmaśāstrapravīṇarappa śrīmatu sāsalūroḍeyaru nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭara maga sōmēśvarabhaṭṭaruṁ kṣmī raṇabhaṭṭa ra maga mahēśvaThe letter ṇa is written below the line.This may beḷakshmīramaṇa.
rabhaṭṭaruṁ gōvindabhaṭṭaruvantu mūvaruṁ tantammōbhāgada hasugeya bhūmigaḷaṁ haccukoṇdu sukhadināḷuttamiralu huliva
rada malliseṭṭi dharmāṁbudhi puṭṭiyā grāmadalalliya svayaṁbhū śrī kalidēvasvāmi dēvargge bhūmiyaṁ māṟugoṁḍu biḍaludyukta
nāgi . Antā hulivarada malliseṭṭiyanvayamentene . Antā hulivaradalliye saṁtōsadiṁdirppa ciṇniseṭṭaya peṁpaṁ saṁtata
me yannadānamanēnu kuḍutirpanelteyāśritajanake . Antenipa ciṇneseṭṭiya kānteyanī kāḷiyakkanaṁ guṇanidhiyaṁ
santatame dānaśīḷeyanentupogaḷuttamirpparī vasumatiyoḷu . Ā ciṇneseṭṭiga kāḷiyakkaṁgaṁ . Antā daṁpatigaḷge puṇya
niḷayaṁ puṇyōdyayaṁ puṭṭidaṁ bhrānti malliseṭṭiyudayaṁgeydaṁ mahōtsāhadiṁ Antinnītane bhūtaḷakke
ya nutsāhadiṁ kūrtu pogaḷguṁ bhūbhāgadoḷu vandigaḷ . śivapadabhaktaṁ kēḷire śiṣaleṁ
kaṁ śivana tottu śivagaṇamitraṁ śivapādapadmabhriṁgaṁ śivanāḷdaṁ malliseṭṭiyaṁ pogaḷada rāru . Antenipa malliseṭṭiyara
guṇōṁnnatiyoḷannadāna kramadoḷ cintāmaṇi surubhūruhadantesedaḷ bīciyakka vanitāratna . naṭabhaṭanagnabhagna
da kānthaka gāyaka dīna hīna karppaṭika jaṭādhara dvija digabaṁra tārkiga digaḷ pasidintu bandu nile nōḍu nī malli
tadiṁ rasōtkaṭa vividhānnamaṁ kuḍu peṁpinoḷārddore malliseṭṭiyoḷ . Āsartu pasidu bandavarggāsarisade kiṟidu baridide
nnade kēḷi sāsala svayaṁbhūdēvara dāsaṁ sale malliseṭṭi dānavinōda . pasidu palarbēḍirddoḍe pasivaṟidāhāradānamikkuva peṁ
paṁ pasidenalisidennade sasimukhiyī bīciyakkanuṇabaḍḍisuvaḷ . Antenisi negarḻda malliseṭṭigaṁ bīciyakkaṁgaṁ . Antava
rirbbarggaṁ sale santati śubhalakṣaṇānvitaṁ rūpinoḷiṁ kantunibhavenipa putraṁ sāntayyaṁ puṭṭidaṁ mahāguṇaniḷayaṁ . dinapaṁge
karṇnanindraṁge nitāṁntaṁ phalguṇaṁ haraṁge gaṇapaṁ danujaṁgekāmaṁ jīyane puṭṭuva teṟade puṭṭidaṁ sāntaṇna . Ātana
kulavadhu vinayōpēte mahāsati patibratāguṇadeḍeyoḷ sīteyane pōltaḷedaṟiṁ mātēno mākaṇabbe kanyāratna . Ante
nipa mākaṇabbege kantunibhaṁ sāntiseṭṭiganunayadiṁdaṁ santati puṭṭidarivarggaḷacintyarkkaḷ kalliseṭṭiyuṁ mallaṇanu .
kuḷatiḷakarkkuḷapūjyarkkuḷavistārarkkuḷapradīparkkaḷivarkkāḷadēvatāprasādaṁ baḷevantire baḷeye puṭṭidarpputrarivar .
Antu negertegaṁ pogarttegaṁ mēlenisi hulivarada bhaṇḍasāleya malliseṭṭi tanna putramitra kaḷatrādigaḷverasu dānadharmmaṁga
ḷamāḍuttavirṛdu viśēṣadharmabuddhi puṭṭi sāsalaśrīkalidēvasvāmi dēvargge bhūmiyaṁ māṟugoṇḍu biḍaludyaktanā
ge . © svasti śrīmaccāḻukya vikramavarṣada 54 neya saumyasaṁvatsarada caitra suddha 2 sōmavāraṁ saṁkrānti bya
tīpātadaṁdu sāsala śrī svayaṁbhu śrī kalidēvasvāmidēvarggalliya Ūroḍeyaṁ piriya modala nārāyaṇabhaṭṭara magaṁ
sōmēsva ra bhaṭṭargge pādapūjeyayvattu gadyāṇa lokkiya ponna koṭṭavara kaiyalavaraṁ śadalavara bhūmiyoḷage huThe lettersva is written below the line.The letter ra is written below the line.
livarada malliseṭṭiyaru māṟugoṁḍu śrī svayaṁbhū śrī kalidēvasvāmidēvaraṁga bhōgakkaṁ dēvara nandādīvige yeṇnegaṁ
dēvara nivēdyakkaṁvallirppa naiṣṭhika tapōdhanarāhāradānakkaveṁdalliya sthānācāyyar dēvarāsipaṇḍitara putraṁ tējōrāsipa
ṇḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi sarbbanamaśyaṁ sarbbabādhāparihāravāgi biṭṭa gaḻde dēviṁgeṟeya keḷage kallakeṟe
yiṁ mūḍaṇa pattida poreyoḷ mattaru 1 matta keṁḍayanāyakana keṟeyiṁ paḍuvalu hakkalu mattaru 2 matta Ūra
teṁkaṇa hebbāgila deseyalu sēgayagēriya paḍuvaṇaṁbeyalavara nivēśanadalirppattondu keyya nīḷaverkeyya
galada mane 1 Antondu mattaru garṛdeyaluvimmattaru Okkalaluṁ voṁdu maneyalu guttageyiṁ puṭṭida gadyāṇaṁ
hattaṟoḷage dēvaraṁgabhōgada śrīkhaṇḍakkaṁ dhūpakkaṁ gadyāṇa 1 dēvara naṁndādīvige yeṇṇege gadyāṇa 1
pa 5 dēvara nivēdyada nelliṁge gadyāṇa 1 pa 5 dēvara pariyaḷakka pakvānnadurṛdigaṁ hesaṟiṁgaṁ tuppakkaṁ gadyā 1Thera is written below the line.
Antu dēvara dēsiya bīyada pariṭhavaṇe gadyāṇavaydu mattavallirppa naiṣṭhikatapōdhana rāhāradānakke pariṣaṁprati gadyā 4
dēvara pūdōṁṭavaṁ sākuvāḷiṁge variṣaṁprati gadyā 1 Antā pariṭhavaṇe gadyāṇa vaydu Anteraḍeḍeya bīyada pariṭhavaṇe
gadyāṇaṁ hattu matta keyya guttageyiṁ maneya bāḍageyiṁ viśēṣaṁ gadyāṇa dharaṇavāgi yuḷidaḍe pasidu baṁdavargaṁbaliya
satravaṁ naḍeyisuvaru . Intī dharmamanalliyācāryaruṁ vallirppa naiṣṭhikatapōdhana ruṁ Ūroḍeyaruṁ vaṟuvatokka
lgaḷuṁ nakaramuṁ mahēśvarajanaṁgaḷuṁ tappaliyde svadharmmadiṁ naḍeyisi rakṣisidavargge gaṁgādēviyalliyuṁ gayeyalluṁ A
rgghkatītthadaluṁ kurakṣētradaluṁ sāvira kavilegaḷaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratna dalu khaciyisi caturvēda pāragareni
sida sabrāhmaṇarggubhayamukhi dānaṁgoṭṭa phaḷamakku . Ī dharmmavaṁ kaṇḍuṁ nōḍiyu vaḷiyaloḍarccida mahāpāta
kaṁgā tīrtthasthānaṁgaḷoḷā kavilegaḷmaṁnā brāhmaṇarumanekkōṭi tapōdhanarumaṁ konda mahāpātakanakku . sāmānyō
yaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālaniyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānu bhāginaḥ pārtthivēndrān bhūyō bhū
yo yācatē rāmacandra . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundharā ṣaṣṭirvarṣa sahaśrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
krimi . nayadiṁ dharmamanoldu rakṣisidavaṁgāyuṁ mahāśrīyuvakkumidaṁ kāyade kāyva pāpige kurukṣētrāṁ
tadoḷ vāraṇāsiyoḷekkōṭimunīndraraṁ kavileyaṁ vēdāḍyaraṁ koṁdudoṁda yaṣaṁ sārṛdapudeṁdu sāṟidapudī śaiḷākṣaraṁ dhātriyo
ḷ . Idanācaṁdrārkkabaraṁ Uditōditamāge kādavaṁ paramadasukha svadanakkuṁ pāpa dinaḷida durātmaṁ narakagatige gaḷagaḷaniḷiguṁ . ©
Digital edition of SII 20.101 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
